title: Orrery
source: location-framing.md → Volume: Orrery (anchor orrery); component detail + base mechanism probed in-game via tools/play.cjs
frame: +X east, +Z south, +Y up. Wide TALL six-sided chamber. The brass disk faces ~east toward the entry, tilted only ~4-5deg back from vertical, mounted/cantilevered on a REAR axle pylon (west) + gears so the FRONT face and the floor before it are clear — that is where the tan globe swings down to the floor and the player grabs it. Alcove cameras (N/S) glimpse the same machine through their archways.

parts.name: ceiling
parts.detail: high roof; the vault above the machine is lost in shadow

parts.name: central base plinth
parts.detail: blocky mechanical plinth the disk is mounted on and rises from; set BEHIND the lower front edge so the front-centre floor stays clear for the swinging orb

parts.name: rear axle pylon
parts.detail: support pylon behind the disk carrying the tilted axle to the hub

parts.name: axle shaft to hub
parts.detail: tilted axle from the rear pylon into the disk's central hub

parts.name: south gear mass
parts.detail: suggestive mechanical mass flanking the disk's lower south side — the generator renders the actual gears/cogs/shafts here from the prose

parts.name: south drive cog (hint)
parts.detail: one exposed cog as a placement hint; the rest of the gearwork is the prompt's job

parts.name: north gear mass
parts.detail: suggestive mechanical mass flanking the disk's lower north side

parts.name: north drive cog (hint)
parts.detail: one exposed cog as a placement hint

parts.name: orrery disk
parts.detail: vast brass disk, nearly upright (~4-5deg back from vertical), front face toward the entry; revolves around the fixed central globe; lower edge a few inches off the floor in front (where the player grabs the swinging tan globe)

parts.name: blue-glass globe (centre/hub, fixed)
parts.detail: large fixed blue-glass globe embedded at the disk's centre, brown/white island-map pattern; the disk rotates around it

parts.name: silver wheel (upper side)
parts.detail: silver wheel on the disk's upper side; itself rotates, carrying the tan globe around the violet hub

parts.name: violet globe (silver wheel hub)
parts.detail: violet globe at the silver wheel's CENTRE — the tan globe orbits around THIS one

parts.name: silver wheel arm (hub to rim)
parts.detail: radial arm/spoke carrying the tan globe around the violet hub — angled sideways so the orb-around-orb motion reads from the front

parts.name: tan globe (silver wheel rim)
parts.detail: tan globe out on the silver wheel's arm, circling the violet hub; ringed with frosted white glass (the blue mask caught in the rings); swings down to the floor at its nadir

parts.name: copper wheel (lower side)
parts.detail: copper wheel on the disk's lower side; carries the green globe around the red hub

parts.name: red globe (copper wheel hub)
parts.detail: red globe at the copper wheel's CENTRE — the green globe orbits around THIS one

parts.name: copper wheel arm (hub to rim)
parts.detail: radial arm/spoke carrying the green globe around the red hub — angled sideways so the orbit reads from the front

parts.name: green globe (copper wheel rim)
parts.detail: small pocked green globe out on the copper wheel's arm, circling the red hub

parts.name: dangling grey strip
parts.detail: thin grey RIBBON/strip of soft cloth-like material hanging limp from the dark vault over the disk's upper edge — out of reach; render as a soft dangling strip, not a rigid pole

parts.name: south alcove floor
parts.detail: small curved alcove off the south side

parts.name: south alcove ladder rail W
parts.detail: iron ladder up a shaft (→ Starry Dome North)

parts.name: north alcove floor
parts.detail: small curved alcove off the north side

parts.name: north alcove stairs
parts.detail: archway onto a flight of ascending stairs (→ Curving Hall West End)

notes.orrery: DIM, deeply shadowed chamber — only faint light, the brass catching low warm highlights, the high vault lost in blackness; not brightly lit. The great disk is mounted in and meshes with an ENGINE of gears, shafts and clattering cogwheels at its base and flanks — render that mechanical detail richly (the blockout only blocks out the base masses; fill in the gearwork). anchor, framing-accurate: eye-level, pressed back against the entry (east) wall, the nearly-upright brass disk filling the frame, lower edge a few inches off the floor in the foreground, upper edge climbing toward the dark vault. Front clear so the tan globe can swing to the floor. Blue hub centre; silver wheel (tan orbiting violet) one side, copper wheel (green orbiting red) opposite.
notes.south-alcove: stand in the small alcove looking through the archway at the SAME machine turning in the chamber; iron ladder up a shaft beside you.
notes.north-alcove: stand in the alcove; archway onto ascending stairs; the same machine glimpsed turning through the opening.
